mapper.select: SELECT id FROM wordbooks WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_name = #{sourceName} ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wordbooks(user_id, name, platform, source_name, import_source, word_count, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{platform}, #{sourceName}, #{importSource}, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, source_name FROM wordbooks
